prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Once upon a time, in the deep blue sea, there lived a shy octopus named Oliver. Oliver had eight long arms covered in suckers, big round eyes, and a soft, squishy body that could change colors. He loved exploring the ocean floor and hiding in the colorful coral reefs. But even though Oliver enjoyed his solitary adventures, he often felt lonely and wished he had friends to play with.
